questions.q: Black Friday falls on the day after which major American holiday?

choices: A video game console sale event
The first Monday after Black Friday

Which type of retail establishment has most benefited from the growth of Cyber Monday?

What is the name of the online shopping event held on the Monday after Black Friday?

choices: Creating artificial scarcity at the entrance
Offering deeply discounted items to attract customers into stores
Removing doors to increase foot traffic

questions.q: What retail phenomenon, amplified by Black Friday marketing, describes the practice of advertising products at a loss to drive store traffic?

Which retail sector typically sees the largest percentage discounts during Black Friday?
What percentage of annual retail sales has Black Friday and the surrounding weekend accounted for in recent years?
Black Friday promotions have increasingly extended beyond one day to encompass what extended shopping period?
choices: Black Friday week through Cyber Monday

questions.q: Which international countries have adopted Black Friday shopping traditions in recent years?
choices: The United Kingdom, Canada, and Australia
